name: Giantess Byakuren (Devout Route)
description:
An unassuming trip to Japan seemed to have gone horribly wrong, waking up in an unknown place with seemingly mythological beings coming to life. Yet, Fortune seems to smile upon the Misfortunate, finding yourself at the foot of another Temple with people that can help... if they notice you, hopefully.

___

Surprisingly enough, I felt bold enough to make another one of these things. Though, admittedly enough, this might've been a bit too big for my britches. Regardless, Hope you have fun with this one. Or at least, find some redeeming qualities about this.

Characters Include:

📜Byakuren Hijiri

🐭Nazrin

👨‍👧Ichirin Kumoi

☁Unzan

⚓Minamitsu Murasa

🐯Shou Toramaru

☀👼🏻Michel Sant'Angelo
